title: gladiolus baumii
intro: Gladiolus baumii, also known as the African corn lily, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus baumii include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve boiling the roots or leaves in water to make a tea or decoction, which can be used to treat various ailments.
